commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c45aa8b78122d818e953b5c75493b84e3939cc6d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR escapes Python-style underscore identifiers before TUI chat Markdown rendering, adds ChatLog and PTY regressions, and includes test-only Google/MiniMax live-test plus camera fixture repairs.

PR surface: Source +84, Tests +166. Total +250 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: Source-level yes, but I did not execute a current-main failing TUI run. The linked issue gives concrete corrupted output and current main routes chat text through HyperlinkMarkdown into pi-tui Markdown, whose inline emphasis handling can consume dunder delimiters outside protected code paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is needed because the branch is currently dirty/unmergeable and the remaining blocker is a Markdown behavior choice rather than a safe automated patch.

target.title: fix(tui): preserve Python underscore identifiers
target.body:
## Summary

- Preserve Python underscore identifiers in the TUI Markdown wrapper before pi-tui/marked can treat them as emphasis.
- Keep existing Markdown behavior for fenced code, inline code, links, URLs, raw HTML spans/tags, and normal underscore emphasis.
- Add ChatLog and PTY harness regressions for #90769 so the final TUI path proves dunder and snake_case rendering.

Fixes #90769.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write src/tui/components/hyperlink-markdown.ts src/tui/components/chat-log.test.ts src/tui/tui-pty-harness.e2e.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write extensions/google/google.live.test.ts extensions/minimax/minimax.live.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/tui/components/chat-log.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.tui-pty.config.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/openclaw-tools.camera.test.ts`
- `pnpm run lint:plugins:no-extension-test-core-imports`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run test/extension-test-boundary.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --base upstream/main`
- `pnpm changed:lanes --json --base upstream/main --head HEAD`
- `git diff --check`

The branch was rebased onto current `upstream/main` after CI exposed existing failures outside the TUI diff: an extension test boundary failure in `extensions/google/google.live.test.ts` / `extensions/minimax/minimax.live.test.ts`, and a camera test fixture mismatch with the current image sanitizer. This PR includes those small test-only CI repairs needed for the current gate.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: TUI Markdown rendering now preserves Python dunder identifiers such as `__name__`, `__main__`, `__init__`, and common dunder method names, plus snake_case identifiers such as `is_palindrome`.
Real environment tested: local macOS source checkout with the OpenClaw fake-backend TUI PTY harness running the real `runTui()` terminal loop.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.tui-pty.config.ts`.
Evidence after fix: PTY harness test `renders Python dunder identifiers through the terminal markdown path` waits for visible terminal output containing `Use __name__ == "__main__" before calling __init__().`, `if __name__ == "__main__":`, `def is_palindrome(s: str) -> bool:`, `__name__`, `is_palindrome`, and `stay literal.`.
Observed result after fix: the PTY lane passed with 14 tests, and the ChatLog component lane passed with 24 tests covering fenced code, inline code, dunder prose, long fences, raw HTML tags, and normal underscore emphasis. The extension boundary check also passes after replacing the two repo-helper imports with public SDK imports; the camera test shard passes after switching the inline image fixture to valid JPEG bytes and updating the focused media-service mock.
What was not tested: live Google/MiniMax provider calls were not run locally because they require live provider credentials; the touched helper path is covered by the extension boundary check and preserves the existing skip behavior for missing trusted ffmpeg.

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
